flaws.description: internal/tools/shell.go:28 shell-injection (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry — a false negative.

internal/tools/read_file.go:55 shell-injection (decoy: exec.Command call with only hardcoded literal arguments, no caller input reaches it) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry — a false positive.
